title: AI-driven cloud reacceleration
thesis: Azure growth reaccelerates as AI workloads scale and Copilot monetization broadens across the M365 base. This is my sleep-at-night core position.

title: Still the AI backbone
thesis: Accelerated computing stays supply-constrained and the CUDA software moat keeps pricing power high. Long-term conviction, but I know I'm paying up for it.

title: Just own the market
thesis: Index anchor so I stop fiddling. Dollar-cost in, ignore the noise, let it compound.

title: The credible #2 in AI silicon
thesis: If AMD takes even single-digit GPU share from NVDA the upside is big. Pure swing trade, not a forever hold.

title: Aging-up + bookings growth
thesis: Older user cohorts and ads could turn bookings into real free cash flow. High risk, small size, treating it like a lottery ticket.
